---
title: "data_maker.Rmd"
author: "Gabriel Watson"
date: "2026-02-27"
output: html_document
---

### Libraries 
```{r}
library(aws.s3)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
```




```{r}
### Data Import
national_water_system <- s3read_using(
  readRDS,
  object = "s3://tech-team-data/national-dw-tool/clean/national/national_water_system.RData")

pwsid_huc <- s3read_using(
  read.csv,
  object = "s3://tech-team-data/national-dw-tool/test-staged/pwsid_npdes_usts_rmps_imp.csv") %>%
  select(pwsid, num_facilities) %>%
  group_by(pwsid) %>%
  summarize(num_facilities = sum(num_facilities, na.rm = TRUE))

epa_sabs <- national_water_system[[1]] %>%
  st_as_sf() %>%
  left_join(pwsid_huc, by = "pwsid")

```


```{r warning=FALSE}

### Get Neighbors (simplified — runs for all systems in a given state subset)
get_neighbors <- function(sabs, cutoff) {
  message("Calculating centroids...")
  centroids <- st_centroid(sabs$geometry)
  centroid_distance_matrix <- st_distance(centroids, centroids)

#  print("Processing ", nrow(sabs), " pwsids...")

  df <- sabs %>%
    mutate(rec = map(1:n(), function(i) {
      
     # print(i)
      this_pwsid <- pwsid[i]
      parent_geom   <- sabs$geometry[i]
      candidate_idx <- which(pwsid != this_pwsid)

      if (length(candidate_idx) == 0) {
        return(tibble(pwsid = character(), centroid_distance = numeric(),
                      travel_distance = numeric(), overlap = logical()))
      }

      centroid_distances <- as.numeric(centroid_distance_matrix[i, candidate_idx]) * 0.000621371
      candidate_pwsids   <- pwsid[candidate_idx]
      child_geoms        <- sabs$geometry[candidate_idx]
    suppressWarnings({  overlaps           <- st_overlaps(parent_geom, child_geoms, sparse = FALSE)[1, ]})

      matches <- tibble(
        pwsid             = candidate_pwsids,
        centroid_distance = centroid_distances,
        overlap           = overlaps
      ) %>%
        filter(centroid_distance <= cutoff | overlap)

      if (nrow(matches) == 0) {
        return(tibble(pwsid = character(), centroid_distance = numeric(),
                      travel_distance = numeric(), overlap = logical()))
      }

      matched_geoms <- sabs$geometry[sabs$pwsid %in% matches$pwsid]

      travel_table <- tryCatch(
        osrmTable(
          src     = st_centroid(parent_geom),
          dst     = st_centroid(matched_geoms),
          measure = "distance"
        ),
        error = function(e) {
          message("  OSRM error for pwsid ", this_pwsid, ": ", e$message, " — falling back")
          NULL
        }
      )

      matches %>%
        mutate(
          travel_distance = if (!is.null(travel_table)) {
            as.numeric(travel_table$distances[1, ]) * 0.000621371
          } else {
            centroid_distance
          },
          overlap = st_overlaps(parent_geom, matched_geoms, sparse = FALSE)[1, ]
        ) %>%
        filter(travel_distance <= cutoff | overlap)
    })) %>%
    mutate(rec_num_neighbors = map_int(rec, nrow))
  
  message("Unnesting...")
  df <- unnest(df, rec, names_sep = "_")

  df %>%
    left_join(
      sabs %>% st_drop_geometry() %>%
        select(pwsid, num_facilities) %>%
        rename(rec_pwsid = pwsid, rec_num_facilities = num_facilities),
      by = "rec_pwsid"
    ) %>%
    mutate(rec_num_facilities = replace_na(rec_num_facilities, 0))
}


```


## Adds vars and geoms for both consolidating and receiving system and saves out to S3 
### Run it 
```{r warning=FALSE}
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
### Run loop over each state, save to S3
# states <- c(
#   "AL","AK","AZ","AR","CA","CO","CT","DE","FL","GA","HI","ID","IL","IN","IA",
#   "KS","KY","LA","ME","MD","MA","MI","MN","MS","MO","MT","NE","NV","NH","NJ",
#   "NM","NY","NC","ND","OH","OK","OR","PA","RI","SC","SD","TN","TX","UT","VT",
#   "VA","WA","WV","WI","WY"
# )

states <- c("HI","ID","IL","IN","IA",
  "KS","KY","LA","ME","MD","MA","MI","MN","MS","MO","MT","NE","NV","NH","NJ",
  "NM","NY","NC","ND","OH","OK","OR","PA","RI","SC","SD","TN","TX","UT","VT",
  "VA","WA","WV","WI","WY"
)
#states <- c("RI,CT")

for (state in states) {
  message("\n========== Processing state: ", state, " ==========")

  state_sabs <- epa_sabs %>%
    filter(str_detect(epic_states_intersect, state))

  if (nrow(state_sabs) == 0) {
    message("No data for ", state, " — skipping.")
    next
  }

  neighbors <- tryCatch(
    get_neighbors(state_sabs, cutoff = 25),
    error = function(e) {
      message("ERROR processing ", state, ": ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )
  if (is.null(neighbors)) next

  # Simplify polygons slightly to reduce file size
  neighbors_simplified <- neighbors %>%
  mutate(geometry = st_simplify(geometry, preserveTopology = TRUE, dTolerance = 10))%>%
  select(pwsid,epic_states_intersect,pws_name,primacy_agency,
         service_connections_count,service_area_type,detailed_facility_report,
         num_facilities,rec_pwsid,rec_centroid_distance,rec_overlap,
         rec_travel_distance,rec_num_neighbors,rec_num_facilities)
  
  pwsids <- neighbors_simplified %>% pull(pwsid) %>% unique(.)
  rec_pwsids <- neighbors_simplified %>% pull(rec_pwsid) %>% unique(.)
    
  cons_vars <- national_water_system[[2]] %>%
               data.frame()%>%
               filter(pwsid %in% pwsids)%>%
               select(pwsid, owner_type, health_viols_10yr, open_health_viol)
  

  rec_geos <- epa_sabs %>%
              filter(pwsid %in% rec_pwsids)%>%
              mutate(geometry = st_simplify(geometry, preserveTopology = TRUE, dTolerance = 10))%>%
              data.frame()%>%
              select(pwsid,pws_name,geometry)
  
  rec_vars <- national_water_system[[2]] %>%
              data.frame()%>%
              filter(pwsid %in% rec_pwsids)%>%
              select(pwsid, owner_type, health_viols_10yr, open_health_viol)%>%
              left_join(.,rec_geos)%>%
              rename_with(~ paste0("rec_", .))
              
neighbors_full <- neighbors_simplified %>%
                  left_join(.,cons_vars)%>%
                  left_join(.,rec_vars)

  # Save as GeoJSON to S3
  tmp_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".geojson")
  st_write(neighbors_full, tmp_file, driver = "GeoJSON", quiet = TRUE)

  s3_path <- paste0("consolidation/mvp/state_data/", tolower(state), "_neighbors.geojson")
  message("Saving ", state, " to s3://tech-team-data/", s3_path)

  put_object(
    file   = tmp_file,
    object = s3_path,
    bucket = "tech-team-data",
    multipart = TRUE,
    acl = "public-read"
  )

  file.remove(tmp_file)
  message("Done: ", state)
}

message("\nAll states processed.")
```
